meta.title: Vera Nova — Business Mentorship · v35 Astra Maven
meta.description: Grow your business with confidence. Template concept.

sections.kicker:
and stop leaving
momentum on the table

sections.p: Vera Nova is a boutique mentorship studio for founders who are done winging it. Strategy without the fluff, accountability without the guilt — and a plan that fits the life you actually want. Placeholder copy for the template concept.

rows.d: We name the real goal first — revenue, freedom, reach — and cut everything that doesn't serve it.
Your best work, packaged so the right clients recognize it instantly — and pay accordingly.
Systems and rhythms that survive busy seasons, not just good weeks.

sections.p: Twelve weeks, one focused cohort, and a mentor in your corner. Build the offer, the pricing, and the pipeline — with feedback on everything you ship.
Short, honest episodes on pricing, positioning, and the mindset it takes to charge like you mean it. Placeholder episode list.

eps.t: Why your best month didn't feel like it
The offer only you can make

sections.q: I stopped discounting, raised my rates, and booked out the quarter. Mostly, I stopped second-guessing every decision.
